data.current_summary: Get opted-out SMS subscribers by opt-out date
data.current_description: Get a list of SMS subscribers who have opted out by opt-out date. Run this on intervals to monitor for opted out subscribers.

data.current_summary: Subscribe to the New Waiver trigger
data.current_description: Subscribe to the New Waiver trigger
data.summary_suggestion: Create subscription to new waiver events
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new subscription to receive notifications when new waivers are created. Requires subscription configuration parameters (e.g., callback URL, notification preferences). Returns a subscription confirmation with subscription ID and status. This operation establishes an active subscription that will trigger notifications for subsequent new waiver events. Modifies subscription state in the system.

data.current_description: Delete an event
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a waiver event and optionally its associated waivers from the system. Requires the event identifier as a parameter. Returns confirmation of deletion. Note: Deleting an event may cascade to remove related waiver records depending on system configuration. This action cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Description is minimal and doesn't explain required parameters or side effects. Added clarity about event identifier requirement, cascade behavior with waivers, and irreversibility warning to help AI agents understand the consequences of this destructive operation.

data.current_description: Delete an event
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a waiver event and optionally its associated waivers from the system. Requires the event identifier as a parameter. Returns confirmation of deletion. Note: Deleting an event may cascade to remove related waiver records depending on system configuration. This action cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Description is minimal and doesn't explain required parameters or side effects. Added clarity about event identifier requirement, cascade behavior with waivers, and irreversibility warning to help AI agents understand the consequences of this destructive operation.
